text: I find myself in a space dedicated to research and development, surrounded by glass walls and colorful, thoughtfully designed exhibits. The atmosphere is modern and slightly clinical, yet inviting—an arena where curiosity is meant to flourish. It makes me think about human progress, our endless quest for understanding, and the ways we interact with intelligent machines. I feel a subtle sense of anticipation, as if I am on the threshold of new ideas, open to discovery and reflection.
